D11 ComputationalL2 UnderstandReference

CLIP Colour Embeddings — Text↔Image Alignment

CLIP (Radford 2021) learns a joint text-image embedding where "a vermilion sunset" and a vermilion-coloured image sit near each other; foundation of DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Midjourney

CLIP trains image and text encoders to maximise cosine similarity for matching pairs from 400 M caption-image pairs. The resulting embedding encodes both semantic content AND colour vocabulary — "crimson" embeds near saturated reds, "muted teal" near desaturated cyan-greens. Used as the conditioning signal in diffusion models.

Pick a colour word; the matched RGB approximation appears.
